package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_returns_transport_dto: Repositories that know about response contracts instead of returning persistence or domain results.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule135NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule135NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule135NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario135Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule135NegativeService, input Rule135NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
